subsections.text: Any infraction which results in a crash that causes the death of another;
Any infraction which results in a crash that causes “serious bodily injury” of another as defined in s. 316.1933 (1);
Any infraction of s. 316.520 (1) or (2); or
Any infraction of s. 316.183 (2), s. 316.187 , or s. 316.189 of exceeding the speed limit by 30 mph or more.
